home.title: Public Art Data Application System
home.description: Empowering communities to measure and shape the impact of public art. Discover how our data collection platform helps drive informed, community-focused urban design.

survey.error: Please answer the question before proceeding.

thankYou.heading: Thank You for Your Submission!
thankYou.text: We appreciate you taking the time to complete this survey.

q1.question: Before this installation, how often did you visit this site?

q2.question: Since the installation, how often do you visit this site?

q3.question: On average, how much time do you spend at this site per visit?

q6.question: What is your race/ethnicity?
options: Native Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander

q8.question: How welcome do you feel on this site? (1 = Not Welcome, 5 = Very Welcome)

q9.question: How safe do you feel on this site? (1 = Not Safe, 5 = Very Safe)

q10.question: How comfortable do you feel on this site? (1 = Not Comfortable, 5 = Very Comfortable)

q11.question: How positive is your overall experience at this site? (1 = Very Negative, 5 = Very Positive)

q12.question: What activity best describes your time spent at this site?
options: Played or engaged with the installation

q13.question: Has this installation made you more interested in exploring the surrounding neighborhood?
